_comment: 28 rectangular 10x10x3mm magnets on outer surface of 4" cast iron tube
_geometry: tube OD=4in=101.6mm -> inner_r=50.8mm; magnet radial=3mm -> outer_r=53.8mm, center_r=52.3mm; 10mm tangential -> arc=10.955deg; 10mm axial; pitch=12.857deg, gap=1.74mm
_magnets: 10x10x3mm NdFeB, radially magnetized, alternating N/S, no sub-block decomposition needed
